title: Weekly SRE Briefing
description: A weekly AI-generated briefing on reliability engineering, incidents, cloud platforms, Kubernetes, observability, and practical SRE lessons.
author: Chris Rimondi

tts.instructions: Read this as a calm, concise technical podcast briefing for an experienced SRE leader. Sound natural and thoughtful. Keep acronyms clear, avoid hype, and maintain a steady Saturday-morning briefing tone.
